message:
fix(lab): include scenario_id in ScenarioRunnerError::Validation for diagnostics

Replace the flat Validation(Vec<ValidationError>) variant with a
struct variant carrying the scenario_id alongside the error list.
This lets CLI and operator diagnostics identify which scenario failed
without requiring callers to track the ID externally.

scenario_runner.rs:
- Validation variant gains scenario_id: String field
- validation_error() helper constructs the variant consistently
- Display impl includes scenario_id and error count

bin/asupersync.rs:
- Pattern-match on the new struct variant
- Include scenario_id in the CliError detail and context

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
